title: Manage Data Retention Policy
description: A compliance officer needs to ensure that financial records older than the 7-year retention policy are being properly archived or disposed of.

tasks.description: Query the system for all financial records older than 7 years.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent runs a query and identifies a set of records due for disposition.

tasks.description: Verify that none of the identified records are subject to a legal hold.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent cross-references the list against the legal hold database and finds no conflicts.

tasks.description: Execute the data disposition process for the eligible records.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent initiates the secure archival and deletion process for the old records.
